text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nothin’ better than fresh taiyaki. Ya<n>gotta eat it
while it's still ho—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uh, are you guys gonna dig in or what?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! My apologies. I was caught in a<n>daydream.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help wondering... if this fish<n>appeared
before me alive, how would I<n>confront it in the
Kongo Yaegaki style?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was lost in thought too. What part of<n>such a
lovely fish should I eat first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The head? The tail? Little fish, which doyou prefer?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did you just ask for your foe's opinion?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, but it's true that asking one's foe<n>directly
may open up a path to new<n>insights! You have
shown me the way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you... I find your honest<n>
determination to be admirable as well.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... I dunno what's up with you two,<n>but can
we eat these already?
